## 🐛 Bug description

A clear, short description of what the bug is.

---

## 📋 Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See the error

---

## ✅ Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

---

## ❌ Actual behavior

What actually happened (screenshots or error messages help).

---

## 📸 Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log excerpts.

| Before | After / Error |
|--------|---------------|
|        |               |

---

## 🖥 Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **PHP:** (e.g. 8.2)
- **Laravel:** (e.g. 10.x)

---

## 📎 Additional context

Any other relevant information.
